claim_title: Version declarations are inconsistent across locations

results.description: Extract version values from four locations and confirm inconsistency.
results.command:
pyv=$(rg -o "version = "[^"]+"" pyproject.toml | sed -E "s/.*"([^"]+)"/\1/"); vfile=$(rg -o "__version__ = "[^"]+"" cohort_projections/version.py | sed -E "s/.*"([^"]+)"/\1/"); ov=$(rg -o "__version__ = "[^"]+"" cohort_projections/output/__init__.py | sed -E "s/.*"([^"]+)"/\1/"); cv=$(rg -n "\*\*Version\*\*" CLAUDE.md | sed -E "s/.*\| ([0-9.]+) \|/\1/"); uniq=$(printf "%s
%s
%s
%s
" "$pyv" "$vfile" "$ov" "$cv" | sort -u | wc -l); echo "PYPROJECT_VERSION=$pyv"; echo "VERSION_PY=$vfile"; echo "OUTPUT_INIT_VERSION=$ov"; echo "CLAUDE_VERSION=$cv"; echo "UNIQUE_VERSION_VALUES=$uniq"; if [ "$uniq" -ge 3 ]; then echo "ASSERTION=PASS"; else echo "ASSERTION=FAIL"; exit 1; fi
failure_reasons: stdout does not match regex: UNIQUE_VERSION_VALUES=[3-9]
results.stderr:
bash: -c: line 1: syntax error near unexpected token `)'
bash: -c: line 1: `pyv=$(rg -o "version = "[^"]+"" pyproject.toml | sed -E "s/.*"([^"]+)"/\1/"); vfile=$(rg -o "__version__ = "[^"]+"" cohort_projections/version.py | sed -E "s/.*"([^"]+)"/\1/"); ov=$(rg -o "__version__ = "[^"]+"" cohort_projections/output/__init__.py | sed -E "s/.*"([^"]+)"/\1/"); cv=$(rg -n "\*\*Version\*\*" CLAUDE.md | sed -E "s/.*\| ([0-9.]+) \|/\1/"); uniq=$(printf "%s'
